form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten 23 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $19. Showed ability the race before when she tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; posted a big 6 m win as favourite (Sr1) at Junee (2:14.10) beating Shoobees Sunset in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $2.40 at the bell was 2nd-4.4. Not here.

Not here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride shortly after the start.
Rounding the first turn jumped a marker peg and broke gait.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 8 m finishing eighth after a quick start, behind Mittys Three Aces at Canberra over 1770m in a NR up to 40 on March 15 at $4.40. Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Lucky Punt at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR up to 47 on April 1 at $23. Draws well and could be close to a win.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr5) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten 30 m by Loyola Golf (2:03.70) in NR 39 to 43 on March 6 at $41. Two runs back 8th (Fr5) over 1635m after showing early speed at Temora beaten 23 m by Holme Boy (1:58.90) in NR 41 to 45 on January 6 at $51. Others rate better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running rounding the home turn.
Checked at the 900m as a result of Betting On Courage pacing roughly.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she 4th (Fr4) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 2nd-6m on the pegs beaten 4.5 m by Bettor Jax (1:54.90) in MAIDEN on November 28 at $41. Readied with two trials so looking for a good return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run she 4th (Fr4) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 2nd-6m on the pegs beaten 4.5 m by Bettor Jax (1:54.90) in MAIDEN on November 28 at $41. Readied with two trials so looking for a good return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the early stages of the home straight for clear running.
Inconvenienced entering the first turn when French Streetbroke gait.
Checked rounding the first turn as a result of Ready To Dream breaking gait.
Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she 4th (Fr7) over 1710m after racing wide at Goulburn was 2nd-1.9m 2WNC at the bell, beaten 11 m by Itz Bad (2:06.10) in 1 WIN on December 22 at $6. Readied with a trial and is among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run she 4th (Fr7) over 1710m after racing wide at Goulburn was 2nd-1.9m 2WNC at the bell, beaten 11 m by Itz Bad (2:06.10) in 1 WIN on December 22 at $6. Readied with a trial and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th (Fr1) over 1740m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 6th-9.1 beaten 16 m by Seaside Sid (2:04.30) in NR up to 52 on March 27 at $18. Before that 5th (Sr1) over 2000m at Temora, at the bell was 9th-12.2 beaten 16 m by Kalkadoon Dreaming (2:29.50) in NR up to 53 on March 3 at $101. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 7th (Sr3) over 2000m at Temora, at the bell was 9th-13.3 beaten 13 m by Millwood Grace (2:30.20) in NR up to 53 on April 6 at $7.50. Showed ability the run before when she won by a head after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:02.70) beating Butter Cup in NR up to 52 on March 24 at $4.20 at the bell was leading 4.8. Among the leading players.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.
Shifting out in the home straight.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up was well back before the turn; posted a big 4 m win (Sr4) at Coolamon (2:11.10) beating Maryville Alfie in 3yo+ MAIDEN on April 25 at $4.60. Would want to see a betting push.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Improved three wide with a trail from the 900m.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 10 m when quickly away, (Fr2) at Riverina Paceway (2:02.80) beating Alwaysthewildest in NR up to 58 M on April 4 at $3.60. Two runs back won by a nose as favourite (Sr1) at Bathurst (2:04.70) beating Get Up Betty in 3yo+ NR up to 52 FM on March 25 at $3.60. With even luck can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered by a breaking runner near the 1600m. Held up throughout the run home.
